---
description: Run monthly or quarterly maintenance review for dependency, contract, CI, and workflow drift.
agent: reviewer
---

Run a maintenance review using `docs/maintenance-cadence.md`:

1. Check dependency and SDK drift in web and dotnet stacks.
2. Check OpenAPI contract drift with the gateway repo.
3. Check CI and workflow file relevance.
4. Check docs and prompt/agent file freshness.
5. Return prioritized maintenance actions.
